title: 7 Top Stocks to Buy to Play the Aging Baby Boomer Trend
text: Under a similar principle to gravity (what goes up must come down), targeting baby boomer stocks to buy aligns with harsh realities: those who are born into this planet eventually get older. Yes, even millennials and Generation Z will at some point be yelling at kids to get off their lawn.

title: Welltower Inc. (WELL) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL ) Q4 2022 Results Conference Call February 16, 2023 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Matt McQueen - General Counsel Shankh Mitra - CEO John Burkart - COO Tim McHugh - CFO Nikhil Chaudhri - CIO Conference Call Participants Jonathan Hughes - Raymond James Michael Griffin - Citi Josh Dennerlein - Bank of America Mike Mueller - JPMorgan Derek Johnston - Deutsche Bank Michael Carroll - RBC Capital Markets Steve Sakwa - Evercore ISI Rich Anderson - SMBC Juan Sanabria - BMO John Pawlowski - Green Street Vikram Malhotra - Mizuho Operator Good morning. My name is Audra, and I will be your conference operator today.

title: Welltower Is A Sell: Market Has Priced In Return To Pre-Pandemic Occupancy Too Soon
text: Senior Housing could face serious long-term headwinds over the next decade. Welltower posted solid 2022 results and is on a path to recovery.

title: Welltower (WELL) Surpasses Q4 FFO and Revenue Estimates
text: Welltower (WELL) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 1.22% and 1.39%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
